title: Simple User Profile API
constraints: Use only the in-memory array provided in the starter code

endpoints.description:
Create a new user profile

Request Body:

* name: string
* email: string

Response:

* 201: Created
* 400: Bad Request

Retrieve a user profile by ID

Params:

* id: integer

Response:

* 200: User profile
* 404: Not Found

List all user profiles

Response:

* 200: List of user profiles
